statements.__comment__: Link NaisApp to KubernetesContainer via exact image_name:image_tag match
statements.query: MATCH (a:NaisApp), (c:KubernetesContainer) WHERE a.image_name IS NOT NULL AND a.image_tag IS NOT NULL AND c.image = a.image_name + ':' + a.image_tag MERGE (a)-[r:RUNS_IMAGE]->(c) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
MATCH (a:NaisApp)-[r:RUNS_IMAGE]->(c:KubernetesContainer) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
